label: Ritual outcome comp (target thing stat)
description: Scores quality based on a stat value of the ritual target Thing, evaluated via a curve.

label.label: Label
label.description: Display label shown in the ritual quality breakdown UI.

labelAbstract.label: Label (abstract)
labelAbstract.description: Alternative label used when no live ritual is available.

qualityOffset.label: Quality offset
qualityOffset.description: Not used directly; quality is computed from the curve evaluated at the thing stat.

curve.label: Curve
curve.description: SimpleCurve mapping the target thing stat value (X) to quality offset (Y).

statDef.label: Stat def
statDef.description: StatDef read from the ritual target Thing.

mustBeBed.label: Must be bed
mustBeBed.description: If true, the comp only applies when the ritual target is a bed.
